announcements.title: We’re getting close 🤍
announcements.text: We officially close on our home this Tuesday, which means Little Cove Early Learning will finally have my full-time focus, energy, and heart. I’ll be in Mt. Ida full time and working daily to bring this space to life for local families. As I continue planning, I wanted to share an important update. Little Cove will include soft worship music at times, and parts of the curriculum will be faith-based. My goal has always been to create a loving, safe, and welcoming environment for every child, and that remains at the center of everything I’m building. I understand this may not be the right fit for every family, and I truly respect that. Thank you for the continued support and patience as Little Cove comes together. I can’t wait to open the doors ❤️

announcements.title: We’re almost ready 💛
announcements.text: We are literally SO close! I’ve finished all my director classes, renewed my CPR/AED certification, and applied for Better Beginnings so we can accept vouchers. We’re getting ready to start transforming the building into our Little Cove home away from home. The amount of support since day one has meant everything to me — I truly wouldn’t have made it this far without y’all. I can’t wait to make Mount Ida proud 🫶❤️
